specs.title: login page loads with sign-in form on desktop
Google OAuth button is visible and positioned above the email input
login page contains links to register and forgot-password
password visibility toggle works
login page renders correctly on mobile viewport
shows validation error for empty email
shows validation error for empty password
shows validation error for invalid email format
shows validation errors for both empty fields simultaneously
loading state is shown while login request is in flight
successful login response redirects away from /login
failed login (401) shows an error toast/message
successful login stores user display info in localStorage
Google OAuth button click initiates the auth redirect
Google OAuth button is not inside a 3-column grid (full-width layout)
unauthenticated user visiting /chat is redirected to /login
unauthenticated user visiting /vault is redirected to /login
unauthenticated user visiting /sovereignty is redirected to /login
redirect URL encodes the intended destination for post-login navigation
authenticated session allows access to /chat without redirect
session cookies survive a page reload
clearing cookies logs the user out on next navigation

empty or whitespace-only message is not sent
AI response arrives from the real backend (real SSE streaming)

mode URL parameter is respected on page load
mode=pro URL parameter activates pro mode
mode=fast URL parameter activates fast mode
prompt URL parameter pre-fills the input

messages are stored in localStorage after a conversation
